homeViewDesc: Create and edit Windows icon DLL libraries.

itemViewCreateDesc: Add ICO or PNG files, check the preview, and prepare the DLL build.

dropZoneDesc: ICO and PNG files are accepted. The real conversion will arrive in the Rust phase.
